description_long: This object is a long, slender knife or sword with a visibly weathered and irregular blade. The blade features a mix of earthy tones, including brown, reddish, and off-white, suggesting rust, patina, or heavy use. The edge appears uneven and jagged, with a pronounced curve along its length, giving it a rugged, almost organic appearance. The handle is less distinct but seems to be integrated into the blade, lacking clear ergonomic shaping or decorative features. There is no visible guard or crossguard separating the blade from the handle. The overall form is reminiscent of a primitive or makeshift blade, possibly fashioned from a single piece of material.
description: A long, curved, and jagged knife or sword with a weathered, earthy appearance and no visible guard or ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and curvature of the blade, with layered earthy colors and a rough, uneven edge.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the thinness and irregular profile of the blade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's curve and layered coloration, similar to view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: View from the handle or tip, showing the blade's width and the transition between blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, straight, no visible grip texture or ornamentation
